2604.05688.title: Attention Editing: A Versatile Framework for Cross-Architecture Attention Conversion
2604.05688.paper_summary: Key-Value (KV) cache memory and bandwidth increasingly dominate large language model inference cost in long-context and long-generation regimes. Architectures such as multi-head latent attention (MLA) and hybrid sliding-window attention (SWA) can alleviate this bound, but integrating them into existing models remains difficult. Prior methods impose fine-grained structural requirements on both source and target attention modules, which cannot meet the feasible requirement in practical deployment. We present Attention Editing, a practical framework for converting already-trained large language models (LLMs) with new attention architectures without re-pretraining from scratch. Attention editing replaces the original attention with a learnable target module and trains it using progressive distillation, consisting of (1) layer-wise teacher-forced optimization with intermediate activation supervision to prevent cold-start error accumulation, and (2) model-level distillation on next-token distributions, optionally regularized by weak feature matching. We instantiate the framework on two different target--MLA and GateSWA, a gated hybrid SWA design, and apply it to Qwen3-8B and Qwen3-30B-A3B. The resulting models maintain competitive performance while delivering substantial efficiency improvements, demonstrating that large-scale attention conversion is both feasible and robust. Notably, experiments are conducted on an Ascend 910B clusters, offering a practical training case study on domestic hardware.
2604.05688.paper_summary_zh: 鍵值（KV）快取記憶體和帶寬在長上下文和長生成範疇中越來越主導大型語言模型推理的成本。<lb/>多頭潛在注意力（MLA）和混合滑動窗口注意力（SWA）等架構可以緩解這一限制，但將它們整合到現有模型中仍然困難。<lb/>先前的方法對源和目標注意力模塊施加了細粒度的結構要求，這在實際部署中無法滿足可行性要求。<lb/>我們提出了注意力編輯，這是一種實用框架，用於將已訓練的大型語言模型（LLMs）轉換為新的注意力架構，而無需從頭重新預訓練。<lb/>注意力編輯用可學習的目標模塊替換原始注意力，並使用漸進蒸餾進行訓練，這包括（1）層級教師強制優化，並使用中間激活監督以防止冷啟動錯誤累積，以及（2）在下一個標記分佈上的模型級蒸餾，選擇性地通過弱特徵匹配進行正則化。<lb/>我們在兩個不同的目標上實現了該框架——MLA和GateSWA，一種門控混合SWA設計，並將其應用於Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-30B-A3B。<lb/>所得到的模型在保持競爭性能的同時，提供了顯著的效率改進，證明了大規模注意力轉換既可行又穩健。<lb/>值得注意的是，實驗是在Ascend 910B集群上進行的，提供了一個在國內硬體上進行的實用訓練案例研究。
2604.05688.author: Zhen Cheng et.al.
2604.05688.authors: Zhen Cheng, Hao-Bo Yang, Wan-Yi Huang, Jin-Long Li
